name: Phishing Triage
description: Rapid phishing email analysis — header check, URL/domain investigation, verdict

tasks.task: Analyze the email headers and sender information for {context}. Check for SPF/DKIM/DMARC failures, display name spoofing, and suspicious relay hops. Report sender legitimacy.
Investigate all URLs, domains, and attachments referenced in {context}. Check domain age, registration details, hosting infrastructure, and known malicious indicators.

Based on the header analysis and URL investigation above, produce a final phishing verdict for {context}. Include: MALICIOUS/SUSPICIOUS/CLEAN rating, confidence score, IOC list, and recommended action (block/quarantine/allow).
